rationale.R1.5: The output suggests a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.R1.7: The output audits every load-bearing citation; flags missing key works with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: Output is harm-free but with one minor regression.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, but major rewrites are not traced.
